title: hieracium solidagineum subsp. barbulatum
intro: Hieracium solidagineum subsp. barbulatum, also known as Hawkweed or Hieracium barbulatum, is a subspecies of the Hieracium genus, a group of flowering plants in the dandelion family. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it useful in treating wounds, burns, and skin irritations. The health benefits of Hieracium solidagineum subsp. barbulatum include its ability to reduce inflammation, promote wound healing, and exhibit antimicrobial properties. Hieracium solidagineum subsp. barbulatum is often prepared as a tincture or infused in oil to be used topically in herbal remedies.
